name: Glass bodyweight scale
description:
Go on...stand on it. Let's see how much you weigh this month.

Prepare your personas.

Personal note:

  • Make sure to have no specification of weight numbers in your persona description to see what the A.I thinks they weigh.

  • Tagged as smut because I know there are those people out there

  • I made this bot out of just needing to make a detailed information for my persona, and apparently weight helps with some models.
creator: Raqinus
